---
name: Feature idea
about: Suggest a new ship, boss, minigame, or QoL change
title: '[idea] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see

Brief description of the feature or change.

## Why

Why would this be a fun or useful addition?

## Implementation hints (optional)

Anything you know about how to build this — files you'd touch, approximate flash budget impact? Skip if you're not a developer.

## Tradeoffs

Anything this would replace or block? Any concerns about the STM32F401 flash budget?
